title: The Legends of Rocks, Roger, and Oden Surface
description: On pages 19–19, this part focuses on Unknown person #17, Whitebeard, Oden, Roger as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All were quite fond of one pirate from Wano.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I pre- same you're referring to Kozuki Oden.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was once a captain on one of whitebeard's ships.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But he was later picked up by Roger, and went along on "The Pirate King's last voyage."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't believe open has anything to do with this most recent development, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What in the world is the story behind Wano and Oden?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are so many powerful individuals connected to Wano?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For one, do not believe it to be a coincidence, Sakazuki.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 11 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
